info.title: API
info.description:
### REST Routes is following REST standard (Richardson level 3)
Detailed specification

**List:** - `GET //`backend - Get the list of **** as admin - `GET /user///` - Get the list of **** for a given **** - Output a **403** if logged user is not **** **Detail:** - `GET //` - Get the detail for **** of id **** - Output a **404** if not found - `GET /user///` - Get the list of **** for a given **user_id** - Output a **404** if not found - Output a **403** if: - Logged user is not **** - The **** have no access to **** **Creation / Edition / Replacement / Suppression:** - `` is: - **POST** for creation - **PATCH** for update (one or more fields) - **PUT** for replacement (all fields, not used) - **DELETE** for suppression (all fields, not used) - ` //` - Create **** with id **** as admin - Output a **400** if **** conflicts with existing **** - ` /user///` - Create **** with id **** as a given **user_id** - Output a **409** if **** conflicts with existing **** - Output a **403** if: - Logged user is not **** - The **** have no access to ****

widget-api-key.name: widget-api-key
widget-api-key.description: Chatbot widget API key (`pk_live_…`). Create keys in AI Chatbot → Embed. Used for `/api/v1/widget/*` routes.

setupToken.description: Short-lived setup token from OAuth callback

phoneNumberId.description: Selected WhatsApp phone number ID from Meta

aiGenerate.description: When true, AI writes the reply using title + response as guidance

serviceName.description: Your business name — shown in the WhatsApp welcome line

welcomeMessage.example: Welcome to {serviceName}! How can we help?
welcomeMessage.description: Optional custom welcome text. Use {serviceName} as a placeholder.

welcomeMessage.example: Hi! How can I help you today?

example: What can you help me with?

visitorId.description: Stable visitor identifier. Generated server-side if omitted.

lastAssistantMessage.description: Last assistant message to derive follow-up prompts from
